title: Modulo_D_Cotizaciones
description: Capítulo IV, Sección I, Apartado D — Lineamientos EFICINE Producción enero 2026. PASS/FAIL. Two mandatory quotes: production insurance and CPA report. Missing either = not evaluated.

d1_cotizacion_seguro_filmico.description: Insurance must provide sufficient coverage for the ENTIRE project cost, protecting against any incident during preproduction, production, and postproduction through final copy.

emitida_a_nombre_de.description: MUST be issued to the ERPI's legal name (razón social). NOT to the producer personally. NOT to the project name alone.

titulo_proyecto_en_cotizacion.description: MUST match the registered project title. If the quote doesn't mention the project name, it will be rejected.

fecha_emision.description: VALIDATION: Must be no more than 3 months before the registration period close date. If older → REJECTED.

monto_cotizado_mxn.description: CROSS-CHECK: Must match EXACTLY the insurance line item in presupuesto desglosado (cuenta Seguros).

tiene_firma_proveedor.description: Must have autograph or digital signature of the provider.

detalla_servicio_producto.description: Must detail the service/product being quoted.

d1_cotizacion_informe_contador.description: CPA (contador público) must be registered with SAT. The report is required per Regla 30.

numero_registro_sat.description: CRITICAL: The CPA must be registered with SAT. If this number is missing from the quote → ALERT. Must also include despacho name if applicable.

emitida_a_nombre_de.description: MUST be issued to the ERPI's legal name.

titulo_proyecto_en_cotizacion.description: MUST match the registered project title.

fecha_emision.description: VALIDATION: Must be no more than 3 months before the registration period close date.

monto_cotizado_mxn.description: CROSS-CHECK: Must match EXACTLY the CPA/auditor line item in presupuesto desglosado.

cotizaciones_opcionales_estrategicas.description: Optional but recommended (Lineamientos A9e): strategic quotes for high-impact budget items to help evaluators assess cost accuracy. VFX, special equipment, major location rentals, etc.
